author: doll-agent
content: find_roots_from_power_coeffs's high-degree path now wraps the companion matrix in Array<f64, Ix2> and calls ferray_linalg::eigvals (faer Schur). Newton polishing afterwards still drives roots to full f64 precision. The internal balance_matrix / qr_eigenvalues / reduce_to_hessenberg / qr_step_hessenberg / eigenvalues_2x2 helpers (~275 lines) are removed since faer subsumes them.
